Home / Services / Residential Wiring

Residential Wiring

Safe and reliable wiring solutions for Boise homes of all ages.

From new construction wiring to updating older homes in the North End, we handle all residential wiring needs. Boise's diverse housing stock requires a nuanced approach. We ensure your home's electrical system meets code and safety standards, whether you're dealing with the unique challenges of wiring in a historic home or setting up a modern smart home system in a new build. Our services include complete home rewiring, outlet and switch installation, lighting upgrades, and electrical panel upgrades. We also specialize in troubleshooting electrical problems and providing efficient repairs to keep your home safe and powered.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Comprehensive Assessment - We evaluate your existing wiring and electrical needs.
  2. 02 Step 2: Detailed Proposal - We provide a clear, upfront estimate with no hidden costs.
  3. 03 Step 3: Expert Installation - Our licensed electricians perform the wiring with precision and care.
  4. 04 Step 4: Thorough Inspection - We ensure everything meets code and safety standards.

Benefits

  • Improved safety and reliability
  • Increased home value
  • Enhanced energy efficiency
  • Support for modern appliances and technology

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should I have my home's wiring inspected?

Homes over 25 years old should have their wiring inspected every 3-5 years to ensure safety and identify potential problems before they become major issues.

What are the signs that my home needs rewiring?

Common signs include flickering lights, frequently tripping breakers, and outlets that feel warm to the touch. If you notice any of these issues, contact us immediately.

Will rewiring disrupt my daily life?

We strive to minimize disruption during the rewiring process. We'll work with you to schedule the work at a convenient time and take precautions to protect your home.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with residential wiring? Contact us today.
